error.title: Couldn't load economy
error.description: Something went wrong loading this household's economy. Try again in a moment.

setup.title: Set up your economy
setup.description: Choose when each budget period begins. You can change this later.

currency.label: Currency
currency.hint: Hemma works in SEK. This can't be changed.

cycleStartDay.label: Cycle start day
cycleStartDay.hint: The day of the month each budget period starts (1–28).

categories.title: Your starter categories
categories.description: These categories were created automatically. You can add or change them later.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.description: Spending and savings accounts in this household.

empty.title: No accounts yet
empty.description: Add a spending or savings account to start tracking balances.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Organize spending into categories and subcategories.
categories.maxDepthHint: Subcategories can't have their own subcategories.

budgetable.label: Budgeted
budgetable.hint: Budgeted categories get a budget line. Turn off for tracked-only categories.

empty.title: No categories
empty.description: Add a category to organize spending.

budget.title: Budget
budget.description: Plan spending for each category this period.

empty.title: Nothing to budget yet
empty.description: Add budgeted categories to plan spending for this period.

emptyPeriod.title: Empty budget
emptyPeriod.description: No budget lines for this period yet. Set amounts below, or copy from the previous period.

record.title: Record transaction

receipt.label: Receipt
receipt.hint: PDF, PNG or JPEG, up to 10 MB.
receipt.errorType: Unsupported file type. Use PDF, PNG or JPEG.
receipt.errorSize: File is too large. Max 10 MB.

record.receiptFailed: Transaction saved, but the receipt didn't upload. Try attaching it again.

empty.title: No transactions
empty.description: Record a transaction to see it here.

searchEmpty.title: No matches
searchEmpty.description: No transaction notes match your search.

savings.label: Record as savings
savings.hint: Books this as a savings allocation under Sparande instead of a neutral movement.

empty.title: Not enough accounts
empty.description: Add at least two accounts to transfer between them.
